title: hicorius glabra var. odorata
intro: Hicorius glabra var. odorata, also known as Smooth Burdock or Gobo, is a type of plant in the Asteraceae family characterized by its edible roots and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hicorius glabra var. odorata include reducing symptoms of arthritis, improving skin health, and supporting the digestive system, as well as helping to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall wellness.
